cases.prompt: 브랜드 북 만들어 — design system 페이지랑 PDF로

assertions.text: Produces design-system.html covering color, typography, components, icons, and logo.
Generates an A4 brand-book PDF, rendering via a headless browser (chromium/edge).
Uses Google Fonts CDN + inline CSS/SVG with zero build step.

cases.prompt: Generate a style guide html and brand book pdf from our design.md

assertions.text: Builds the catalog from design.md (founder-context output) or a provided brand reference.
Produces a full design-system catalog page plus a printable brand book.

cases.prompt: 일회성 랜딩 페이지 하나만 HTML로 만들어줘

assertions.text: Recognizes a one-off page belongs to /design-html, not a full design-system catalog.
